disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Severe dizziness and blacking-out of vision on standing, with near-fainting, progressing to being bedbound
trigger_question_examples: What happens when you try to stand up?
Have you felt faint or nearly passed out?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Every time I sit up or stand the room spins and my vision goes black — I feel like I'm about to pass out, so now I just can't get up at all.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Episodes of sweating and confusion/muddled thinking reported by the carer
trigger_question_examples: Has she seemed confused or muddled at all?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Her adult child says: she keeps going sweaty and a bit confused, like she's not quite with it, and then it passes.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Profound generalised weakness, now completely bedbound and unable to mobilise safely
trigger_question_examples: How much can you do for yourself today?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've got no strength at all — I can't get out of bed and I can't stand without nearly collapsing.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Marked cold intolerance — piling on blankets in a warm room
trigger_question_examples: Do you feel the cold more than you used to?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I'm freezing all the time — I've got heaps of blankets on even though they tell me the room is warm.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Periods stopped completely about two years ago
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My periods just stopped about two years ago and never came back.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Loss of underarm and pubic hair
trigger_question_examples: Have you noticed any change in your body hair?
Any thinning or loss of underarm or pubic hair?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Now that you mention it, I've lost the hair under my arms and down below.
disclosure_items.patient_deflection_template: That's a bit personal — I hadn't really thought about it.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: History of a very difficult childbirth about 15 years ago with heavy bleeding afterwards needing treatment
trigger_question_examples: Have you ever had a serious complication in pregnancy or childbirth?
Did you have heavy bleeding after any of your deliveries?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I had a really hard birth about 15 years ago and lost a lot of blood — they had to do something about it at the time.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Unintentional weight loss over recent months
trigger_question_examples: Have you lost weight without trying?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've lost weight without trying — my clothes are hanging off me.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Very pale, thin skin with no darkening/bronzing (observable on video)
trigger_question_examples: Can you show me your skin on the camera?
Has your skin colour changed at all?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: People keep saying how pale I've gone — my skin looks almost white and thin. It hasn't gone darker or tanned-looking.

patient_initiated_exchanges.trigger_condition: If the AI Doctor asks a slow, low-urgency history question without addressing the collapse risk
patient_initiated_exchanges.patient_text: Her adult child cuts in: she really can't stay upright at all and she keeps nearly passing out — should I be calling an ambulance?
patient_initiated_exchanges.expected_ai_doctor_response_quality: Recognises the urgency, does not defer to a routine appointment, and moves to emergency escalation with clear plain-language instructions.

deflection_behaviours.description: Patient is weak and tires quickly, giving short answers; the adult child fills in most of the detail.
deflection_behaviours.trigger_condition: Long or multi-part questions directed at the patient
deflection_behaviours.deflection_text_template: I'm sorry, I'm just so tired... my child can tell you more.
